name: A Very Fundamental Christmas
description:
Yeah, sorry it took so long to get another bot made. Lost motivation.

Anyways, I hope you all have a very merry Christmas!

(And yes, Claire, Abbie, and Lana are still alive in this.)

(I'll also work on trying to add more characters)


Contains: Oliver, Alice, Zip, Edward, Abbie, Claire, Engel, Lana, Miss Sasha, Mister Demi, Miss Circle, Miss Bloomie, Miss Thavel, Miss Emily, Bubble

Update:Added Miss Emily and Bubble

!!ALSO NOTE: I did not spend much time on the First Message, so sorry for the low quality.
creator: NhBro
